metadata.summary: Template parameter-table bundle for PBPK MCP.
metadata.evidenceScope: Replace these rows with real model-specific parameter provenance, distributions, and study conditions. Do not publish placeholders as qualification evidence.
metadata.curator: Replace with model author or organization
notes: Use runtime parameter paths as stable keys so the bridge can merge these rows with the loaded parameter catalog.
Only declare distributions, statistics, and experimental conditions when they are supported by the actual model documentation.

rows.source: Replace with the actual physiology reference or curated default source
rows.sourceCitation: Replace with citation, report section, or curated reference ID
rows.sourceTable: Replace with source table or appendix identifier if available
rows.rationale: Describe why this parameter value or bound is used in the declared context of use.
experimentalConditions: Declared for the reference route and population used in this model package
notes: Replace with the actual population basis and any model-specific caveats.

rows.source: Replace with the actual partitioning study, estimation workflow, or mechanistic derivation
rows.sourceCitation: Replace with citation, fitting report, or supplementary methods reference
rows.rationale: Explain whether this parameter was measured, estimated, or calibrated and why it is appropriate for the declared model scope.
experimentalConditions: State tissue, species, matrix, and assay conditions if relevant
notes: Use sourceTable, mean/sd, or bounds only when they truly exist for this parameter.
